NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR, NOTICED IN DISCOVERY. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Assignee Creditors Trade Association'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Assignee Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
